name: Buttermilk Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it boils lightly for about 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Pour the frosting over the hot cake.
5. If desired, use half of the recipe to make less frosting.
